name: every render mapping either uses an emitter-supported serialization format (json, yaml, toml, ini) or is honestly marked unsupported
command: ruby -ryaml -rset -e 'sup=["json","yaml","toml","ini"].to_set; bad=[]; YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"].each{|k,v| r=v["render"]; next unless r; next if r["supported"]==false; bad<<k unless sup.include?(r["fmt"])}; exit(bad.empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo render-fmts-supported 1>&2
